topic.title: Understanding the CapCut Editing Workspace
topic.shortdesc: Explore the main interface and tools in CapCut's editing workspace.

section.title: Main Workspace Areas
section.p: Preview Window: Shows your video in real-time as you edit.
Timeline: Displays all video clips, audio, text, and effects in order.
Tool Panel: Contains buttons for adding text, effects, transitions, and more.
Media Library: Access to your imported videos, photos, and music.
